title: celtica gigantea
intro: Celtica gigantea, also known as tree club moss, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve congestion. Celtica gigantea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
